subtitle.en: in a chain of alternating single and double bonds, the HOMO-LUMO gap shrinks as the chain grows; at ~11 conjugated double bonds the absorption falls into the visible — β-carotene is orange
subtitle.ko: 단일·이중 결합이 번갈아가는 사슬에서 길이가 늘면 HOMO-LUMO가 좁아진다 — N≈11에서 가시광 흡수로 β-카로틴은 주황색

description.en: Zig-zag chain with N double bonds. λ_max grows with N; the absorption band enters the visible around N=10. Markers for retinal, β-carotene, crocetin anchor the empirical curve.
description.ko: N개 이중결합의 지그재그 사슬. λ_max가 N에 따라 증가하고 N=10 부근에서 가시광 진입. retinal·β-carotene·crocetin 앵커 마커.
